scene: Side by side, a tiny old-fashioned little shopping cart next to a giant oversized modern shopping cart, a small cartoon shopper standing between them looking up at the huge one. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A cartoon shopper looking down into a huge shopping cart that has only two or three small items lying at the bottom, lots of empty space, the shopper frowning like it looks too empty. Flat light blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The same cartoon shopper now eagerly piling lots more groceries into the big cart with both arms to fill up the empty space. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A big shopping cart shown as a sneaky character with little eyes, overflowing with groceries, a cartoon shopper beside it scratching their head in surprise. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
